introSection: Spider is a Maurer Rides spinning roller coaster located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA. It opened in April 2003. The ride features spinning ride vehicles that can seat two sets of two passengers, facing in opposite directions.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 8 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
Spider is a Maurer Rides spinning roller coaster located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA. It opened in April 2003. The ride features spinning ride vehicles that can seat two sets of two passengers, facing in opposite directions.



8 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.
